title: Add Sign-Up Link Below Login Box
story: As a potential DataTools Pro user on the login page, I want to see a sign-up link that takes me to the beta registration page, so that I can easily create an account if I don't have one yet.
description: Add a sign-up link below the login box on the application's login/passcode page. The link directs users to the `/beta` signup page on the marketing site, providing a clear path for new users who arrive at the login page but haven't registered yet.
acceptance_criteria: A sign-up link is visible below the login box
The link navigates to the /beta signup page
Link is positioned on the passcode screen (not the Salesforce login screen)
ux_changes: New sign-up link added below the login/passcode box, directing unregistered users to the beta signup page.
implementation_notes: Developer suggested placing the link on the passcode screen rather than the login screen, which was the more appropriate location for catching unregistered users.
comment_summary: Developer added the link to staging and suggested it should be on the passcode screen instead of the login screen for better placement.
